concepts.title: Image encoding and patch embeddings
concepts.hook: ViT-style patch encoding; project images to token space.

concepts.title: Visual-language alignment (CLIP, ALIGN)
concepts.hook: Contrastive learning of image-text pairs; enables zero-shot classification.

concepts.title: Token interleaving and mixed modality
concepts.hook: Interleave image and text tokens; enables cross-modal reasoning.

concepts.title: Document understanding and OCR-free approaches
concepts.hook: Models like GPT-4V and Claude 3.5 handle documents natively.

concepts.title: GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini 3, Qwen VL models
concepts.hook: Understand images, text, video; differences in modality support.

concepts.title: Video understanding and long-video models
concepts.hook: Temporal understanding; sample frames vs dense processing.

concepts.title: Audio and speech models
concepts.hook: Whisper for speech-to-text; Gemini 3 handles audio natively.

concepts.title: Chain-of-thought with visual reasoning
concepts.hook: Explain reasoning over images; improves accuracy.

concepts.title: Visual question answering (VQA)
concepts.hook: Answer questions about images; benchmark for visual understanding.
